panels.title: Total Cost (Today)
panels.description: Total spend across all Claude Code sessions that started today. If this is climbing unexpectedly fast, check the Cost by Agent Type panel — a single Opus delegation or a runaway sidechain is usually the culprit.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') = date('now', 'localtime')

panels.title: Total Cost (All Time)
panels.description: Cumulative spend since metrics collection began. Use this as a baseline when estimating project budgets — compare against the Cost by Project panel to see which codebases consume the most.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics
targets.queryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cost_usd), 0) AS cost FROM agent_metrics

panels.title: Cost Over Time
panels.description: Daily spend trend across all Claude Code sessions. Spikes usually indicate large Opus delegations or sessions with many turns — check the Cost by Agent Type panel to identify the driver.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime')) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime')) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cost per Card Completed (7-day rolling)
panels.description: Total cost / done cards, 7-day rolling window. Falling = changes are working; rising = quality or efficiency degrading.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH daily_cost AS (SELECT date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') AS day, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day), daily_done AS (SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') AS day, COUNT(*) AS dones FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', d.day) AS time, SUM(c.cost) OVER (ORDER BY d.day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) / NULLIF(SUM(d.dones) OVER (ORDER BY d.day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 0) AS cost_per_card FROM daily_done d LEFT JOIN daily_cost c ON c.day = d.day ORDER BY d.day ASC
targets.queryText: WITH daily_cost AS (SELECT date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') AS day, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day), daily_done AS (SELECT date(recorded_at, 'localtime') AS day, COUNT(*) AS dones FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY day) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', d.day) AS time, SUM(c.cost) OVER (ORDER BY d.day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) / NULLIF(SUM(d.dones) OVER (ORDER BY d.day ROWS BETWEEN 6 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 0) AS cost_per_card FROM daily_done d LEFT JOIN daily_cost c ON c.day = d.day ORDER BY d.day ASC

panels.title: Cost Over Time by Agent
panels.description: Daily cost broken out by top-5 agents by total cost in the visible period; remaining agents aggregated as "other".

targets.rawQueryText: WITH top5 AS (SELECT agent FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY SUM(cost_usd) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime')) AS time, CASE WHEN am.agent IN (SELECT agent FROM top5) THEN am.agent ELSE 'other' END AS agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics am WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime'), CASE WHEN am.agent IN (SELECT agent FROM top5) THEN am.agent ELSE 'other' END ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: WITH top5 AS (SELECT agent FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent ORDER BY SUM(cost_usd) DESC LIMIT 5) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime')) AS time, CASE WHEN am.agent IN (SELECT agent FROM top5) THEN am.agent ELSE 'other' END AS agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost FROM agent_metrics am WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime'), CASE WHEN am.agent IN (SELECT agent FROM top5) THEN am.agent ELSE 'other' END ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cost by Agent
panels.description: Week-over-week cost delta per agent role. cost_7d vs cost_prior_7d shows whether an agent is trending up or down in spend. Filter by repo using the Repo variable above.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH last_7d AS (SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost_7d FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days') AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent), prior_7d AS (SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost_prior_7d FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-14 days') AND recorded_at < datetime('now', '-7 days') AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent) SELECT l.agent, l.cost_7d, COALESCE(p.cost_prior_7d, 0) AS cost_prior_7d, CASE WHEN p.cost_prior_7d IS NULL OR p.cost_prior_7d = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((l.cost_7d - p.cost_prior_7d) / p.cost_prior_7d) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM last_7d l LEFT JOIN prior_7d p ON l.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS cost_7d, p.cost_prior_7d, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior_7d p LEFT JOIN last_7d l ON p.agent = l.agent WHERE l.agent IS NULL ORDER BY cost_7d DESC
targets.queryText: WITH last_7d AS (SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost_7d FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days') AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent), prior_7d AS (SELECT agent, SUM(cost_usd) AS cost_prior_7d FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-14 days') AND recorded_at < datetime('now', '-7 days') AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent) SELECT l.agent, l.cost_7d, COALESCE(p.cost_prior_7d, 0) AS cost_prior_7d, CASE WHEN p.cost_prior_7d IS NULL OR p.cost_prior_7d = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((l.cost_7d - p.cost_prior_7d) / p.cost_prior_7d) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM last_7d l LEFT JOIN prior_7d p ON l.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS cost_7d, p.cost_prior_7d, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior_7d p LEFT JOIN last_7d l ON p.agent = l.agent WHERE l.agent IS NULL ORDER BY cost_7d DESC

panels.title: Cost by Kanban Session
panels.description: Cumulative spend per kanban session name (e.g., swift-falcon). If one session dwarfs the rest, inspect which agents drove the cost.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT kanban_session, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kanban_session ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT kanban_session, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost, COUNT(DISTINCT session_id) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kanban_session ORDER BY total_cost DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Cost Efficiency Trend (cost per 1K tokens, with cache ratio)
panels.description: Effective cost per 1K tokens (cost_usd / total_tokens * 1000) and cache hit ratio overlaid. Cache improving means effective cost drops.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime')) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens), 0) AS cost_per_1k_tokens, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime')) AS time, SUM(cost_usd) * 1000.0 / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + output_tokens + cache_read_tokens + cache_write_tokens), 0) AS cost_per_1k_tokens, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens + cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at) <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', COALESCE(last_seen_at, recorded_at), 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cards Completed Per Day
panels.description: Daily card completion velocity. A rising trend means more work is flowing through to done; gaps indicate days with no completions.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS cards_done FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Card Cycle Time
panels.description: Time from first 'doing' event to 'done' event per card. Cards with very long cycle times may indicate tasks that are too large or agents that got stuck.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT kce_done.card_number, kce_done.kanban_session, ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 1440, 1) AS cycle_minutes, kce_done.agent, kce_done.recorded_at AS completed_at FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' ORDER BY cycle_minutes DESC LIMIT 50
targets.queryText: SELECT kce_done.card_number, kce_done.kanban_session, ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 1440, 1) AS cycle_minutes, kce_done.agent, kce_done.recorded_at AS completed_at FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' ORDER BY cycle_minutes DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Lead Time Distribution
panels.description: Distribution of how many hours cards take from first 'doing' to 'done'. The bulk of the distribution shows the typical card duration; outliers on the right indicate cards that got stuck or were exceptionally complex.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 24, 2) AS lead_time_hours FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_start.recorded_at IS NOT NULL
targets.queryText: SELECT ROUND((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 24, 2) AS lead_time_hours FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_start.recorded_at IS NOT NULL

panels.title: Average Lead Time by Agent
panels.description: Week-over-week average lead time delta per agent (milliseconds from card start to done). Green delta_pct means faster. Uses event_type = 'start' as the anchor (the correct kanban CLI event).

targets.rawQueryText: WITH last_7d AS (SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0), 0) AS avg_lead_ms_7d FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days') GROUP BY kce_done.agent), prior_7d AS (SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0), 0) AS avg_lead_ms_prior_7d FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-14 days') AND kce_done.recorded_at < datetime('now', '-7 days') GROUP BY kce_done.agent) SELECT l.agent, l.avg_lead_ms_7d, COALESCE(p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d, 0) AS avg_lead_ms_prior_7d, CASE WHEN p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d IS NULL OR p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((l.avg_lead_ms_7d - p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d) / p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM last_7d l LEFT JOIN prior_7d p ON l.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS avg_lead_ms_7d, p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior_7d p LEFT JOIN last_7d l ON p.agent = l.agent WHERE l.agent IS NULL ORDER BY avg_lead_ms_7d DESC
targets.queryText: WITH last_7d AS (SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0), 0) AS avg_lead_ms_7d FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days') GROUP BY kce_done.agent), prior_7d AS (SELECT kce_done.agent, ROUND(AVG((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0), 0) AS avg_lead_ms_prior_7d FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-14 days') AND kce_done.recorded_at < datetime('now', '-7 days') GROUP BY kce_done.agent) SELECT l.agent, l.avg_lead_ms_7d, COALESCE(p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d, 0) AS avg_lead_ms_prior_7d, CASE WHEN p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d IS NULL OR p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((l.avg_lead_ms_7d - p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d) / p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM last_7d l LEFT JOIN prior_7d p ON l.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS avg_lead_ms_7d, p.avg_lead_ms_prior_7d, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior_7d p LEFT JOIN last_7d l ON p.agent = l.agent WHERE l.agent IS NULL ORDER BY avg_lead_ms_7d DESC

panels.title: Weekly Lead Time Trend (median duration)
panels.description: Average lead time per week, in milliseconds displayed as human-readable duration (SQLite has no native MEDIAN; AVG is used as an approximation). Tells you whether throughput is improving or degrading.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH lead_times AS (SELECT kce_done.card_number, strftime('%Y-W%W', kce_done.recorded_at, 'localtime') AS week, MIN(kce_done.recorded_at) AS week_done_at, ((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0) AS lead_ms FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND kce_done.recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kce_done.card_number, week) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(week_done_at, 'localtime', 'weekday 0', '-6 days')) AS time, AVG(lead_ms) AS avg_lead_ms FROM lead_times GROUP BY week ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: WITH lead_times AS (SELECT kce_done.card_number, strftime('%Y-W%W', kce_done.recorded_at, 'localtime') AS week, MIN(kce_done.recorded_at) AS week_done_at, ((julianday(kce_done.recorded_at) - julianday(kce_start.recorded_at)) * 86400000.0) AS lead_ms FROM kanban_card_events kce_done INNER JOIN (SELECT card_number, MIN(recorded_at) AS recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'start' GROUP BY card_number) kce_start ON kce_done.card_number = kce_start.card_number WHERE kce_done.event_type = 'done' AND kce_done.recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND kce_done.recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY kce_done.card_number, week) SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(week_done_at, 'localtime', 'weekday 0', '-6 days')) AS time, AVG(lead_ms) AS avg_lead_ms FROM lead_times GROUP BY week ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Token Usage Breakdown
panels.description: Input, output, and cache-read token volumes stacked by model family. A small cache-read segment relative to input means context is being invalidated — check if CLAUDE.md or skill files changed recently.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT model, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read_tokens, SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cache_write_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY input_tokens DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT model, SUM(input_tokens) AS input_tokens, SUM(output_tokens) AS output_tokens, SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS cache_read_tokens, SUM(cache_write_tokens) AS cache_write_tokens FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY model ORDER BY input_tokens DESC

panels.title: Cache Hit Ratio Over Time
panels.description: Percentage of input tokens served from cache vs. fresh input, per day. Below 70% means context is being invalidated frequently — check if CLAUDE.md or skill files changed recently.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens) + SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, CAST(SUM(cache_read_tokens) AS REAL) / NULLIF(SUM(input_tokens) + SUM(cache_read_tokens), 0) * 100 AS cache_pct FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Permission Denials Over Time
panels.description: Daily count of permission denials. Rising denials indicate agents attempting actions outside their allowed scope — check the Permission Denials by Tool panel to identify which tools are being blocked.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(denied_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM permission_denials WHERE denied_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND denied_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', denied_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(denied_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS denials FROM permission_denials WHERE denied_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND denied_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', denied_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Permission Denials by Tool
panels.description: Tools that were blocked by the permission system, ranked by denial count. Repeated denials for the same tool indicate an agent is attempting actions it is not authorized for — either the task prompt needs adjustment or the permission configuration needs updating.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS denial_count FROM permission_denials GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY denial_count DESC LIMIT 20
targets.queryText: SELECT tool_name, COUNT(*) AS denial_count FROM permission_denials GROUP BY tool_name ORDER BY denial_count DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Tool Usage Heatmap
panels.description: Call frequency per tool, broken down by bash command. High call counts for any single tool indicate heavy usage patterns — cross-reference with Most Denied Tools to see if those same tools are also being blocked.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT tool_name, bash_command, SUM(call_count) AS total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage GROUP BY tool_name, bash_command ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 50
targets.queryText: SELECT tool_name, bash_command, SUM(call_count) AS total_calls FROM agent_tool_usage GROUP BY tool_name, bash_command ORDER BY total_calls DESC LIMIT 50

panels.title: Agent Run Duration
panels.description: Distribution of agent run durations in minutes (last_seen_at minus first_seen_at). The bulk of the distribution shows typical agent duration; outliers on the right indicate agents working on large or complex tasks.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT CASE WHEN duration_minutes < 5 THEN '<5m' WHEN duration_minutes < 15 THEN '5-15m' WHEN duration_minutes < 30 THEN '15-30m' WHEN duration_minutes < 60 THEN '30-60m' WHEN duration_minutes < 120 THEN '1-2h' ELSE '>2h' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT (julianday(last_seen_at) - julianday(first_seen_at)) * 1440 AS duration_minutes FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND last_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND first_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND last_seen_at > first_seen_at) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY MIN(duration_minutes)
targets.queryText: SELECT CASE WHEN duration_minutes < 5 THEN '<5m' WHEN duration_minutes < 15 THEN '5-15m' WHEN duration_minutes < 30 THEN '15-30m' WHEN duration_minutes < 60 THEN '30-60m' WHEN duration_minutes < 120 THEN '1-2h' ELSE '>2h' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS count FROM (SELECT (julianday(last_seen_at) - julianday(first_seen_at)) * 1440 AS duration_minutes FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND last_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND first_seen_at IS NOT NULL AND last_seen_at > first_seen_at) GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY MIN(duration_minutes)

panels.title: Model Distribution by Agent
panels.description: Cross-reference of agent types with model families. Shows call frequency and cost patterns to identify expensive or over-engineered model selections.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT agent, model, COUNT(*) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent, model ORDER BY total_cost DESC
targets.queryText: SELECT agent, model, COUNT(*) AS sessions, SUM(total_turns) AS total_turns, SUM(cost_usd) AS total_cost FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY agent, model ORDER BY total_cost DESC

panels.title: Turns Per Agent
panels.description: Week-over-week turn count delta per agent role. turns_7d vs turns_prior_7d shows whether an agent is consuming more or fewer API round-trips. Filter by repo using the Repo variable above.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH last_7d AS (SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS turns_7d FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days') AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent), prior_7d AS (SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS turns_prior_7d FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-14 days') AND recorded_at < datetime('now', '-7 days') AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent) SELECT l.agent, l.turns_7d, COALESCE(p.turns_prior_7d, 0) AS turns_prior_7d, CASE WHEN p.turns_prior_7d IS NULL OR p.turns_prior_7d = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((CAST(l.turns_7d AS REAL) - p.turns_prior_7d) / p.turns_prior_7d) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM last_7d l LEFT JOIN prior_7d p ON l.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS turns_7d, p.turns_prior_7d, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior_7d p LEFT JOIN last_7d l ON p.agent = l.agent WHERE l.agent IS NULL ORDER BY turns_7d DESC
targets.queryText: WITH last_7d AS (SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS turns_7d FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days') AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent), prior_7d AS (SELECT agent, SUM(total_turns) AS turns_prior_7d FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-14 days') AND recorded_at < datetime('now', '-7 days') AND git_repo LIKE '$repo' GROUP BY agent) SELECT l.agent, l.turns_7d, COALESCE(p.turns_prior_7d, 0) AS turns_prior_7d, CASE WHEN p.turns_prior_7d IS NULL OR p.turns_prior_7d = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((CAST(l.turns_7d AS REAL) - p.turns_prior_7d) / p.turns_prior_7d) * 100 END AS delta_pct FROM last_7d l LEFT JOIN prior_7d p ON l.agent = p.agent UNION ALL SELECT p.agent, 0 AS turns_7d, p.turns_prior_7d, NULL AS delta_pct FROM prior_7d p LEFT JOIN last_7d l ON p.agent = l.agent WHERE l.agent IS NULL ORDER BY turns_7d DESC

panels.title: Agent Activity Over Time
panels.description: Daily count of agent runs per agent type. A declining trend for a particular agent type may signal that delegation to that specialist is being reduced, intentionally or not.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS agent_runs FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC
targets.queryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT00:00:00Z', date(recorded_at)) AS time, COUNT(*) AS agent_runs FROM agent_metrics WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%d', recorded_at, 'localtime') ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Card Flow
panels.description: Recent cards with their events, showing the flow from creation through to completion. Cards with multiple cycles (todo→doing→done more than once) indicate quality issues or under-specified task definitions.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT card_number, kanban_session, event_type, agent, model, recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 100
targets.queryText: SELECT card_number, kanban_session, event_type, agent, model, recorded_at FROM kanban_card_events WHERE recorded_at >= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch')) AND recorded_at <= strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch')) ORDER BY recorded_at DESC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Cards Done (7d)
panels.description: Total cards completed (done events) in the last 7 days. Measures throughput velocity.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS done_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days')
targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(*) AS done_count FROM kanban_card_events WHERE event_type = 'done' AND recorded_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days')

list.name: repo
list.label: Repo
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT git_repo FROM agent_metrics WHERE git_repo IS NOT NULL ORDER BY git_repo

list.name: Changes
list.rawQuery: SELECT strftime('%s', recorded_at) * 1000 AS time, message AS text, COALESCE(tags, '') AS tags FROM claudit_annotations WHERE recorded_at >= datetime($__from/1000, 'unixepoch') AND recorded_at <= datetime($__to/1000, 'unixepoch') ORDER BY recorded_at
